examples.title: Basic typography
examples.description: Named typographic variants mapped to the design token scale.
examples.code: Heading 1 Heading 2 Heading 3 Heading 4 Heading 5 Heading 6 Subtitle 1 — rendered as p Subtitle 2 — rendered as p Body 1 — the default variant, rendered as p. Body 2 — smaller paragraph text, rendered as p. Caption — rendered as span. Overline — uppercase, rendered as span. Label — medium weight, rendered as span. h2 styled as a span (component override) Body with gutterBottom. noWrap — this long text will be truncated with an ellipsis when it overflows. noWrap also truncates inline variants like caption, not just block ones.
